query: I'm helping you plan a 7-day trip for two people from North Platte to Colorado, exploring three cities, starting from March 20 to March 26, 2022. The trip allocation would be a budget of $6,500. When it comes to lodging, we prefer accommodations where parties are allowed, and non-shared rooms are a must for us. As for transportation, we're aiming to exclude flight options.

plan.current_city: from North Platte to Grand Junction
plan.transportation: self-driving, from North Platte to Grand Junction, duration: 7 hours 27 mins, distance: 809 km, cost: 40
plan.attraction: Museum of the West, Museums of Western Colorado; Eureka! McConnell Science Museum; Bananas Fun Park;
Western Colorado Botanical Gardens; Canyon View Park; Eagle Rim Park;

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Grand Junction to Durango, duration: 3 hours 33 mins, distance: 269 km, cost: 13
plan.attraction: Animas Museum; The Powerhouse; Durango Wildlife Museum;
plan.accommodation: Lux 1BR in the heart of NYC Theater district!

plan.attraction: Whitewater Park; Durango Adventures and Zipline Tours; Oxbow Park and Preserve;
plan.accommodation: Lux 1BR in the heart of NYC Theater district!

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Durango to Colorado Springs, duration: 5 hours 27 mins, distance: 504 km, cost: 25
plan.attraction: The Broadmoor Seven Falls; Garden of the Gods; Manitou Cliff Dwellings;
plan.lunch: Raglan Road Irish Pub and Restaurant

plan.attraction: Cheyenne Mountain Zoo; Cave of the Winds Mountain Park; Ghost Town Museum;

plan.current_city: from Colorado Springs to North Platte
plan.transportation: self-driving, from Colorado Springs to North Platte, duration: 4 hours 40 mins, distance: 536 km, cost: 26
